headline: Why Extendicare (TSX:EXE) Is Up 6.0% After CBI Deal, Dividend Hike And BBB Rating – And What's Next
summary: CIBC Capital Markets recently reiterated its outperformer rating on Extendicare after the company closed a C$570 million acquisition of home health care operator CBI Health, reported Q4 results above expectations, increased its dividend, and received a BBB credit rating from DBRS. At the same time, labour tensions escalated as CUPE, representing over 30,000 long-term care and retirement home workers, prepared for a “summer of action” in response to stalled negotiations with Extendicare,...
